agent.plan.description: Break the request into a concrete frontend implementation plan.

goal.description: Short description of the build goal.

agent.inspect.description: Inspect the current project tree or a specific set of files.

targets.description: Optional absolute project paths to inspect.

agent.search.description: Search filenames and file contents for a query.

query.description: Text to search for across the current project.

agent.read.description: Read specific files for editing context. Pass at most 2–3 paths per call; call again for the next batch.

targets.description: Absolute project paths to read (max 2–3 per call).

agent.create.description: Create new frontend files. Pass at most 2–3 files per call; call again for the next batch.

intent.description: Short reason for the new files.

files.description: Map of absolute project paths to full file contents (max 2–3 entries). Example: { "/src/App.tsx": { "code": "import React..." } }

targets.description: Optional path list matching the written files.

agent.edit.description: Update one existing frontend file. One file per call; call agent.edit again for each additional file.

files.description: Map of one absolute path to full file contents. Example: { "/src/App.tsx": { "code": "..." } }

targets.description: Optional path list matching the written file.

agent.patch.description: Apply a targeted search-and-replace to one existing file (first occurrence, or all when replaceAll is true).

path.description: Absolute project path to the file.

search.description: Exact substring to find (must appear at least once).

replaceAll.description: Replace every occurrence instead of only the first.

agent.rename.description: Rename a file without changing its contents.

agent.delete.description: Delete one obsolete file. One path per call; call again for each additional file.

targets.description: Exactly one absolute project path to remove.

agent.verify.description: Run local consistency checks before finishing. Optionally run npm run build inside the Cloudflare Sandbox when sandboxBuild is true or checks includes "sandbox build".

checks.description: Optional named checks such as entry exists or imports resolve.

sandboxBuild.description: When true (and the Studio session uses a sandbox), sync files and run npm run build in the remote sandbox; stderr/stdout are returned in the tool result.

agent.complete.description: Finish the request and commit final project metadata.

summary.description: Short summary of what was created or updated.

entry.description: Absolute path to the final entry file.

dependencies.description: Dependency map to merge into the project.
